title: citrus garrawayae
intro: Citrus garrawayae, also known as the garraway's orange, is a rare and endangered species of citrus fruit that is native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The health benefits of Citrus garrawayae include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve immune function. Citrus garrawayae is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
